question: Based on the area chart of site visits from 2018 to 2022, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: 2018 had the fewest site visits of all the years shown.
options.B: Site visits in 2021 and 2022 appear to be identical because both years reach the top of the chart.
options.C: The site had fewer visits in 2020 than in 2019.
options.D: Site visits decreased steadily from 2018 through 2022.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bars are truncated and looks identical.
